**Findings**

- Blocking: [docs/examples/research/rules.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/examples/research/rules.toml:26) says “Experiments depend on the goal they advance.” In JIT dependency language, the rest of this ruleset and tests use the opposite edge: the goal depends on experiments, e.g. [rules.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/examples/research/rules.toml:205) and [research_bracket_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/research_bracket_tests.rs:237). Because this is a copyable example ruleset, the contradiction is user-facing technical debt and can lead users to wire the graph in a way that makes `child-link = "dependencies"` coverage fail incorrectly.
